task_completion.description: Verify the Subject, Status, and Due Date of the Sales Order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'SO-2024-GF-SEASONAL' in the Subject field, 'Created' in the Status field, and '2025-03-31' in the Due Date field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Organization and Contact names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Greenfield Properties LLC' in the Organization Name field and 'Diana Greenfield' in the Contact Name field.
Look for '450 Oak Valley Drive, Portland, OR 97201, United States' in the Billing Address text area.
Look for 'Premium Lawn Fertilizer 50lb' in the Item Details section with Quantity '20' and List Price '45.00'.
Look for 'Cedar Bark Mulch - Cubic Yard' in the Item Details section with Quantity '15' and List Price '38.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the third line item (Irrigation Kit).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Irrigation Drip Kit Standard' in the Item Details section with Quantity '8' and List Price '125.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Grand Total and that the Sales Order is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Grand Total of approximately '2470.00' and evidence that the record has been saved (e.g., viewing the detail page instead of the edit form, or a success notification).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to create the Sales Order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Vtiger CRM web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Vtiger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match Vtiger CRM, not a mock HTML page or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected output into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected values must appear within the correct input fields or saved record views of the CRM, not in a standalone text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Sales Order Subject is 'SO-2024-GF-SEASONAL'. Organization: 'Greenfield Properties LLC'. Contact: 'Diana Greenfield'. Status: 'Created'. Due Date: '2025-03-31'. Total Amount: 2470.00 (tolerance +/- 50.0). Line Items (3): Premium Lawn Fertilizer 50lb (Qty 20, Price 45.00), Cedar Bark Mulch - Cubic Yard (Qty 15, Price 38.00), and Irrigation Drip Kit Standard (Qty 8, Price 125.00).
